title: Caravanserai The Return Opening Night Extravaganza
description: After a three-year wait... Caravanserai is back in Brighton! The doors are swinging open, and the walls are coming down for our opening night party. For one night only, our main venue Klub Kaput will drop its walls, and the party will be open to the whole site for FREE! We are bringing together our favourite bands and DJs from throughout the years at Caravanserai and inviting you back into our family to celebrate a jaw-dropping month ahead. Our launch night is proudly sponsored by Caffrey’s Black Stout. Entry is free, but we welcome donations on-site to support our artists! Please note that anyone under the age of 18 must leave the site by 9pm, and this will be enforced.

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
